name: FortiGate Malicious URL Attack
description: Detects attempts to access malicious URLs, as identified by FortiGate. This rule is specific to FortiOS V6.0.4 due to the message_id.

prompts.prompt: Critical FortiGate alert: Attempted access to a known malicious URL detected. This is a high-risk indicator of potential initial access via phishing or drive-by compromise. Event Details: **Timestamp** {timestamp}, **Log ID** {log_id}, **User** {user}, **Source Address** {source_address}, **Destination Address** {destination_address}, **Source Country** {source_country}, **Destination Country** {destination_country}, **Malicious URL** {url}, **Severity** {severity}. Investigate this critical event immediately to contain potential infection and identify the source of the malicious link.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the malicious URL event.

parameters.name: log_id
parameters.description: The FortiGate Log ID for the event (16399 for FortiOS V6.0.4).

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user attempting to access the malicious URL.

parameters.name: source_address
parameters.description: The source IP address from which the URL access was attempted.

parameters.name: destination_address
parameters.description: The destination IP address of the malicious URL.

parameters.name: source_country
parameters.description: The country of origin for the source IP (enriched via GeoIP).

parameters.name: destination_country
parameters.description: The country of the destination IP (enriched via GeoIP).

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The malicious URL that was accessed.

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: The severity level reported by FortiGate for the event.
